headline: Inside India newsletter: Energy, airlines and now over $50 billion in remittances to India at risk as Middle East conflict deepens
summary: India can't seem to escape from the fallout of the escalating conflict in the Middle East. After energy and aviation, remittances could be the latest worry.

headline: Trinseo downgraded to Selective Default after interest payment misses
summary: S&P Global Ratings on March 3 downgraded Trinseo Plc to Selective Default (SD), from CCC and a negative outlook, after the company missed interest payments on its term loan B due 2028 and on its 7.625% senior secured second-lien notes due 2029. The company’s secured debt was also downgraded, to D, from CC. The term loan is a constituent of the Morningstar LSTA US Leveraged Loan Index. S&P said that extending the term loan’s initial five-day grace period to March 19 — the interest payment was due
